productDisplayName: Spykar Men Range Blue-White Stripes Blue Shirts
description: Composition Dark blue shirt made of 100% cotton, with red, light blue and white stripes, full hand sleeves with a mid-sleeve buttoned flap, front buttoned placket with brand embroidery on the left chest, tipped collar and curved hemline Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash in warm water Wash only with like colours Use mild detergent Do not bleach Dry under shade Use warm iron Stylish to the hilt, this striped shirt from spykar is a great addition to your wardrobe. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims or corduroys and suede shoes to look like the king of casual wear. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6’1”; Chest: 38.5”; Shoulders: 18.5”
